name: Texwinca Holdings Limited
summary: Texwinca Holdings Limited engages in the production, dyeing, and sale of knitted fabrics, yarns, and garments. The company offers finished knitted fabric products in single knit, double knit, velour and polar fleece, jacquard, spandex, stripe, and flat knit areas. It also provides dyed yarn products, such as ramie/cotton, rayon/cotton, acrylic/cotton, and polyester/cotton blend yarn dyed products, as well as cotton yarn dyed products. In addition, the company retails and distributes casual apparel and accessories; and offers franchise services. Further, it is involved in the property holding and sub-letting activities; and holding of trademarks and properties. The company sells its products in the United States, Mainland China, Japan, Hong Kong, and internationally. Texwinca Holdings Limited was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong.
